taskDescription: Complete the crossword puzzle on hip joint anatomy.

words.clue: Type of synovial joint that the hip is classified as (ball-and-...)
Cup-shaped socket formed by ilium, ischium, and pubis
Fibrocartilaginous ring that deepens the acetabulum by 20%
Strongest ligament in the body, also called Y-ligament of Bigelow
Death of bone tissue due to loss of blood supply (avascular ...)
Pit on the femoral head for attachment of the round ligament
The visceral layer of serous pericardium covering the heart (or hip joint equivalent covering bone)
Vessels running along the femoral neck under the capsule, carrying blood to the femoral head
Artery through the ligament of the head, branch of the obturator artery
Condition where femoral neck angle is decreased below normal
